inquiry.bodyHtml:
Contact / Business Inquiries
For business inquiries, please contact me here 🤍
♡ ♡ ♡
📧
Contact
For business inquiries, please contact me here

I am not native English speaker and most of my fans are Japanese.
Please read the following information carefully and contact me via mitaraiasobu@gmail.com or direct message on X.
https://x.com/MitaraiAsobu

📢 Regarding Streaming Services / App Invitations
At this time, I am focusing on my YouTube activities and am not accepting proposals related to joining or moving to streaming platforms or applications.
However, I may consider promotional or sponsorship opportunities depending on the content.
🏢 Regarding Agency Affiliation
I welcome inquiries from agencies that respect my current YouTube activities and are able to provide long-term support.

I am only interested in agencies that allow me to continue my current style of activities without major restrictions or significant changes, while also providing further support.

Specifically, I am looking for support such as:
  • Providing streaming equipment
  • Support or assistance with merchandise shipping
  • Management of sponsorships and business opportunities
  • Introducing or arranging creators for video editing, vocal mixing, merchandise illustrations, Live2D model updates, etc.
  • Allowing me to continue activities while maintaining my current design and image
    (I am open to bringing my current Live2D model or discussing partial design adjustments.)
  • Respecting my current direction and activity style as much as possible
    (It is important to me that my current activities can transition into agency activities without major changes.)
If your agency can fulfill all of the above conditions, I would be happy to hear from you.

After joining an agency, I hope to focus primarily on streamer-related activities such as streaming, video production, and planning projects.
Therefore, if I do not feel that the benefits outweigh the freedom of independent activities, I may decline affiliation.

I do not wish to be heavily 'produced' or controlled as a creator.
I would like to decide as much as possible about my stream content and how I interact with viewers.

At the same time, I am happy to cooperate with agency ideas and participate positively in various projects and activities.

As I have clear standards regarding agency affiliation, I apologize that I may not be able to meet expectations in many cases.
Thank you for your understanding.
📦 Product / Service Promotions & Sponsorships
I do not accept requests that do not clearly state compensation or budget.
Even if you ask me to provide my desired rate, please include your minimum and maximum budget range.
I may decline requests that do not match my brand image.
📊 Audience Demographics & Activity Trends
Last Updated: 2026/05/29
*If there are no updates for a long period, please assume there have been no major changes.
■ Audience Gender
Male73.2%
Female26.7%

Japan85.4%

■ Audience Age Groups
13〜1715.1%

25〜3434.3%
35〜4418.1%

【Streaming Hours & Viewing Trends】

The highest viewer activity is between 18:00 and 22:00.
There are noticeable differences between daytime and nighttime audiences.

【Most Popular Stream Categories】

(Based on an independent audience survey)

Gaming Streams46.9%
Chatting Streams37.5%

Although still experimental, there are also viewers interested in ASMR-related content.

【Viewer Participation Streams】

More than 10 viewers usually participate in collaborative digital drawing streams.
These are usually held on Sundays.

Viewer participation streams for Identity V are also very popular.
These are usually held on Fridays.

【Characteristics of Each Stream Type】

■ Singing & Drawing Streams
These streams tend to achieve especially high concurrent viewers, total views, and average watch time.

■ Identity V Participation Streams
While concurrent viewers are average, viewers tend to participate actively and create lively interactions.

■ Chatting Streams
Although average in concurrent viewers, these streams attract the most new viewers.

【Channel Scale】

• Average Concurrent Viewers: Approximately 15

• Peak Concurrent Viewers: 41 (during the 3,000 subscriber celebration stream)


♡ ♡ ♡
Mitarai Asobu
